title: Avoide sending email without email address
excerpt: it is expected behavior that if you don’t have any emails in your email column, the system will not perform the automation since there will be no emails sent to anyone, but if you have an email in the column you will be …

posts.author: SasonL (Sason Levi)
posts.cookedHtml:
it is expected behavior that if you don’t have any emails in your email column, the system will not perform the automation since there will be no emails sent to anyone, but if you have an email in the column you will be notified.
There is no alert from the system when the automation has no email address and therefore failed to send the email.
